overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a luxury futuristic penthouse. The character moves from a neon-lit interior with modern furnishings and a grand piano through a sliding glass door into a sunlit tropical patio with palm trees, pool, and lounge areas overlooking a futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living area with grand piano and indoor pool

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious luxury apartment, passing modern furnishings and approaching the exit

entered.detail: futuristic blue neon strip lighting along the ceiling edges
black glossy grand piano situated in the living area
large floor-to-ceiling glass door leading to the exterior patio
reflective water pool inside the apartment with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic apartment interior. Blue neon lights trace the ceiling above a polished marble floor. A grand piano sits centrally while an indoor pool reflects the ambient lighting. The camera moves steadily toward a large sliding glass door revealing bright daylight outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential patio with tropical landscaping and city views

events.description: character exits the apartment through the sliding glass door into the bright sunlit patio
abrupt shift from dim interior lighting to bright natural sunlight causing exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the apartment into the tropical patio and walking along the patterned stone pathway

entered.detail: futuristic metal lattice tower with multiple antenna arrays rising above the landscape
tall tropical palm trees lining the patio walkway
decorative stone tiles with wave-like patterns in beige and gray
trimmed green bushes bordering the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the apartment into a bright, sunlit luxury patio. The scene opens to reveal tall palm trees, patterned stone walkways, and a prominent futuristic communication tower in the distance. The environment shifts from enclosed interior to open tropical landscape with clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: poolside lounge area with artificial shade structures and water features

events.description: camera slows and turns slightly toward the lounge chairs and pool edge

agents.ego_description: walking around the poolside area, passing wooden lounge chairs and approaching the water's edge with tropical landscaping

entered.detail: modern wooden sun loungers with white cushions arranged in pairs
large shade structure with artificial palm fronds on a metal pole
reflective swimming pool with rocky naturalistic edges
large boulders and rocks surrounding the pool with tropical plants

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the poolside area featuring wooden lounge chairs beneath an artificial palm umbrella. The camera moves along the water's edge past rocky landscaping and tropical vegetation. The futuristic city tower remains visible in the distant background while the character surveys the luxurious outdoor amenities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit futuristic interior into a bright, open-air tropical patio. It begins by gliding across polished marble floors beneath blue neon ceiling lights, passing a grand piano and a reflective indoor pool. As the camera approaches and passes through a large sliding glass door, the enclosed atmosphere shifts abruptly into a sunlit landscape of patterned stone walkways and towering palm trees under a clear blue sky. The scene then expands toward the poolside area, moving past wooden lounge chairs and rocky tropical vegetation while a futuristic communication tower looms in the distance. Finally, the camera drifts along the water's edge to survey the expansive outdoor amenities and the distant city skyline.
